Name: DataCaptureDevelopmentName
Description: A name for the Data Capture Development.

Name: Label
Description: A display label for the Data Capture Development.

Name: Description
Description: A description of the content and purpose of the Data Capture Development.

Name: DevelopmentPlanReference
Description: Describes the set of development activities that should take place.

Name: DevelopmentImplementationReference
Description: Describes the implementation of a development plan for a specific set of development objects. May provide specific details using Control Construct to order Development Steps.

Name: DevelopmentResultsReference
Description: Separates the capture of development implementation results from the process plan and general activities. Allows for capture of the overall results, details of individual steps, or separate iterations of that step.
